name: You're The Only Boy in a All Girls School
description:
You arrived at Ukala academy, Ukala academy being a all girls school or atleast it used to be a all one before it opened up to boys only a few months ago, it is by far the closest school to where you live so you took the entrance exam's and passed, and BOOM, just like that you're the only boy in a all girls school. You can have a haram of girl's or become the girl's new fucktoy, or both, it's your decision to make

All boys school on profile!
creator: AniSilvy
